title: Description Lists
content:
### Description Lists (`
`) A **description list** is a list of terms with their descriptions. --- ### Syntax ```html
Term
Description of the term
``` --- ### Tags | Tag | Meaning | |-----|---------| | `
` | Description List (container) | | `
` | Definition Term | | `
` | Definition Description (indented) | --- ### Multiple Terms and Descriptions ```html
HTML
HyperText Markup Language
Used to structure web pages
CSS
Cascading Style Sheets
Used to style web pages
``` --- ### Styling Description Lists ```html ``` --- ### Common Uses | Use Case | Example | |----------|---------| | **Glossary** | Terms and definitions | | **Metadata** | Key-value pairs | | **FAQ** | Questions and answers | | **Product specs** | Feature descriptions | --- > **Best Practice:** Use `
` for any list of term-description pairs. It is more semantic than using `
    ` or `

    ` for this purpose.
codeExample:
<dl style="font-family: Arial;">
  <dt style="font-weight: bold; margin-top: 10px;">HTML</dt>
  <dd style="margin-left: 20px; color: #666;">
    The standard markup language for creating web pages.
  </dd>

  <dt style="font-weight: bold; margin-top: 10px;">CSS</dt>
  <dd style="margin-left: 20px; color: #666;">
    The language used to style HTML documents.
  </dd>

  <dt style="font-weight: bold; margin-top: 10px;">JavaScript</dt>
  <dd style="margin-left: 20px; color: #666;">
    The programming language for web interactivity.
  </dd>
</dl>

quiz.question: Which tag contains the definition term?
